section_name: Rights of owners of real property
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prevent the owner of real property used by the public for purposes of vehicular travel by permission of the owner and not as matter of right from prohibiting such use, or from requiring conditions additional to those specified in this chapter, or from otherwise regulating such use as may seem best to such owner.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 35. Unif. Statewide Application
##### § 1601 — Rights of owners of real property

Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prevent the owner of real property used by the public for purposes of vehicular travel by permission of the owner and not as matter of right from prohibiting such use, or from requiring conditions additional to those specified in this chapter, or from otherwise regulating such use as may seem best to such owner.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prevent the owner of real property used by the public for purposes of vehicular travel by permission of the owner and not as matter of right from prohibiting such use, or from requiring conditions additional to those specified in this chapter, or from otherwise regulating such use as may seem best to such owner.
